coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in should clarify what a Senior Backend Engineer wants to own next quarter before the billing rewrite collides with her existing plans.
openingQuestion: What are you hoping to own next quarter, and how has shipping Monday’s feature shaped what feels most important to you now?
listenFor: whether she names a specific next-quarter scope or stays broad about future ownership
if they volunteer a concrete reason for being quieter this week versus brushing it off quickly
whether she brings up mentoring through a specific person, project, or kind of guidance she wants to provide
avoid: do not treat her quieter week as a problem to solve before you understand whether it is normal post-launch recovery
do not introduce the billing rewrite as a done deal before hearing what senior-level ownership she is already orienting toward
goodOutcome: You and Priya have agreed one senior-level ownership area she wants to lead next quarter, plus whether mentoring is part of that scope before you position the billing rewrite.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example of her impact from the feature launch and one plausible next-quarter scope so you can test fit without steering too early.
